name: Anna Kowalski
institution: Max Planck Institute of Molecular Cell Biology and Genetics
thesis: Live imaging of chromosome dynamics during human embryonic stem cell differentiation
transitionSignals: Building personal website showcasing industry-relevant skills
Mentoring undergrads interested in biotech careers
description: Anna is a 3rd-year PhD student using advanced live imaging to understand how stem cells decide their fate. Her expertise in organoid culture and imaging makes her attractive to regenerative medicine companies.
